variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16714 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16714 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16714 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 326.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 251.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M6X1, Height 1 (H1): 203.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 159.5 mm
